section.heading: Open data publication
section.chapeau: All public data assets published by the Bureau shall be—

paragraph.content: made available as an open Government data asset (as defined in section 3502 of title 44);
rendered in a human-readable format; and
accessible via application programming interface where appropriate.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 111–203, title X, § 1019, as added Pub. L. 117–263, div. E, title LVIII, § 5851(a)(2), Dec. 23, 2022, 136 Stat. 3433.)

note.heading: Rule of Construction Regarding No New Disclosure Requirements
note.p: Enactment of section not to be construed to require certain additional information to be collected or disclosed, see section 5853 of Pub. L. 117–263, set out as a note under section 5498 of this title.
